description: List of all Action Plan References

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[plan_item_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan Item ID(s).

parameters.name: filters[plan_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan ID(s)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Direction (asc/desc) can be controlled by the presence or absence of '-' before the sort parameter.

payload.description: Contains specific attributes depending on the type of Reference

drawing_id.description: ID of the Drawing the Drawing Revision belongs to

drawing_revision_id.description: ID of the latest Drawing Revision of the Drawing

file_version_id.description: ID of the latest File Version of the Folder File

folder_id.description: ID of the Folder File the File Version belongs to

specification_section_current_revision_i.description: Current Revision ID of a Specification Section
